item.title: Reports
item.description: DTEX publishes comprehensive insider risk management reports, from the cost of insider threats to nation-state operations and more.

item.title: Whitepapers
item.description: DTEX white papers provide in depth information and guidance on the most important aspects of insider risk management.

item.title: Events
item.description: Get the details on the latest DTEX events to stay up to speed with the latest insights on insider risk management and more.

item.title: Technology Alliances
item.description: DTEX partners with industry leading technology providers to deliver the most advanced insider risk management solutions to customers.

item.title: Strategic Partners
item.description: DTEX strategic partners are advancing insider risk management with us, making strides to enhance security and innovate solutions together.

item.title: Marketplace
item.description: DTEX partners with industry leading technology providers to deliver powerful insider risk management solutions to customers.

item.title: Channel Partners
item.description: DTEX partners with industry leading technology and solution providers to deliver powerful insider risk management solutions to customers.

item.title: Subscribe Now
item.description: Subscribe to the DTEX newsletter to get insider insights and learn more about DTEX events, product launches, and strategic initiatives.

item.title: For Microsoft 365
item.description: DTEX integrates with the Microsoft Defender suite and Information Protection, helping to deliver better behavior analytics.

item.title: DTEX Next 2025
item.description: Discover DTEX NEXT innovations: proactive security, risk-adaptive DLP, insider threat detection, and AI governance to stay ahead of threats.

item.title: Newsroom
item.description: Check back here for the latest DTEX news, product updates, and company announcements.

item.title: Blog
item.description: Read the DTEX Blog for trusted insights on insider risk management, data loss prevention, AI, proactive security, and more.

item.title: For Crowdstrike
item.description: DTEX and CrowdStrike enable rich behavioral context and deep endpoint telemetry for real-time visibility into user activity and data usage.

item.title: Press Releases
item.description: DTEX press releases provide in depth information and guidance on the latest news on insider risk management.

item.title: DTEX Customer Support Services
item.description: Learn more about DTEX support services that are provided to customers licensing DTEX software and services an MSA.

item.title: DTEX| The Risk-Adaptive Security Platform for the Human and AI Enterprise
item.description: Only DTEX unifies DLP, behavioral analytics and user activity monitoring with AI to stop insider risks from becoming data breaches.

item.title: Resource Center
item.description: The DTEX Resource Center provides in depth information and marketing assets on a range of insider risk management topics.

item.title: Resource Webinars
item.description: DTEX webinars provide in depth information and guidance on the most important aspects of insider risk management.

item.title: Careers
item.description: DTEX depends on bright, energetic, talented people who share a passion for building the next generation of insider risk management solutions.

item.title: Case Studies
item.description: See how DTEX has helped enterprise organizations across industries, like healthcare, telecommunications and government to stop cyber threats.

item.title: Datasheets
item.description: DTEX datasheets provide in depth explanations of the features and capabilities of the DTEX Platform.

item.title: For Splunk
item.description: Together, DTEX and Splunk more effectively manage insider threats and extend visibility through a single pane of glass.

item.title: E-Books
item.description: DTEX e-books provide in depth information and guidance on the most important aspects of insider risk management.

item.title: Guides
item.description: DTEX provides comprehensive insider risk management guides to help organizations protect against data loss.

item.title: Infographics
item.description: DTEX infographics of the most important and pressing issues concerning insider risk management and data loss prevetion.

item.title: Solution Briefs
item.description: DTEX solution briefs provide highlight the features and capabilities of the DTEX Platform and solutions for insider risk management and DLP.

item.title: Threat Advisories
item.description: DTEX publishes regular insider threat advisors to help organizations protectively protect against insider threats.

item.title: Videos
item.description: DTEX videos provide in depth information and guidance on the most important aspects of insider risk management.

item.title: Webinars
item.description: DTEX webinars provide the most important and up to date information about how to tackle the challenges of insider risk management.
